scripts.clean: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('out', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('node:fs').rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo', { force: true })"
scripts.probe:stdio: pnpm --filter @aurelia-ls/semantic-runtime build && pnpm build && node scripts/probe-stdio.mjs
scripts.release:pack: pnpm --filter @aurelia-ls/semantic-runtime build && pnpm build && node esbuild.mjs
scripts.smoke:postinstall: pnpm --filter @aurelia-ls/semantic-runtime build && pnpm build && node scripts/probe-stdio.mjs
scripts.contract:adversarial-surface: pnpm --filter @aurelia-ls/semantic-runtime build && pnpm build && node scripts/contract-adversarial-surface.mjs
